compiled_state.title: test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh fails intermittently in full test suite but passes in isolation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh fails when run as part of the full test-batched.sh suite but passes when run alone. Likely a test ordering or shared state issue causing interference from a prior test. Root cause unknown - needs investigation to identify the shared resource or global state being contaminated.

comments.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE cluster, opus): Already-fixed duplicate of 5a5b-a3c3 (closed 2026-04-12). Commit 720cbc2a replaced clone_test_repo + silently-failing 'ticket init || true' with clone_ticket_repo (pre-built template fixture from tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh, no silent-failure pathway). All 3 tests empirically pass: in isolation, under 'test-b*' filter, 'test-[a-b]*' filter, and full-suite batched run through target tests (0 failures). Tickets filed 2026-04-19 without cross-referencing prior resolution.
comments.author: Test
